title: triticum turgidum subsp. dicoccum
intro: Triticum turgidum subsp. dicoccum, also known as einkorn, is an ancient type of wheat that has been cultivated for thousands of years. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of einkorn are numerous, including its ability to aid in digestion, lower cholesterol levels, and even help to regulate blood sugar levels. Einkorn can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusion, or as a dietary supplement, making it a versatile addition to a healthy lifestyle.
